_README: Canonical list of warehouse events that count as 'a human was actively working at this moment'.
Every source listed here is an explicit, audit-able event-type-with-filter — not a 'whatever shows up'.
The scanners (scan_staff_activity.py + scan_staff_activity_buckets.py) read THIS file and ignore
every other warehouse table. If the resulting Activity bar looks wrong, the rule belongs in here, not buried in the scanner.
Adding a new source: append an entry below + re-run the scanner. The Holidays Activity tab will document it automatically.

sources.label: Application opened in CRM
sources.description: Written when a CRM agent navigates into an application (BRW / prospect) record in /Payout/Caseview. The row is triggered by SmartLook starting a screen recording at the moment of view. EventTypeId 14 = 'ApplicationOpened' (per the wiki /Central_CRM.md and the feed-filter spec which classifies this as a 'View'). ClientType=CRM% scopes to clicks-from-an-agent and excludes any system caller using the same username.

sources.label: Loan case opened in CRM
sources.description: Written when a CRM agent navigates into an existing loan case in /Collections/Caseview. SmartLook trigger, same shape as the application-side view. EventTypeId 11 = 'CaseOpened' (per Central_CRM.md and the feed-filter spec which classifies this as a 'View'). ClientType=CRM% scopes to agent clicks.
